description: Self-hosted web research for MCP agents.
name: io.github.MarcellM01/tinysearch

environmentVariables.description: MCP transport to serve: stdio (default), sse, or streamable-http.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Path to a research_config.json inside the container, for overriding search/embedding defaults.
environmentVariables.name: TINYSEARCH_CONFIG_PATH

environmentVariables.description: SearXNG search endpoint URL. Only needed if not using the bundled Compose SearXNG service.
environmentVariables.name: SEARXNG_URL
